text: Oh great, another Monday. Just what I needed.
Honestly, the layover in Reykjavik was the best part of the trip — we got to see the northern lights from the terminal.
Wow, you replied to my email within three weeks. Impressive turnaround.
I love how my plants thrive the moment I stop caring about them.
The new intern fixed in one afternoon what the vendor couldn't fix in six months. No, really.
Sure, I'd be delighted to review a 400-page spec by tomorrow morning.
Gate agent rebooked us, walked us to the lounge, and comped dinner. Airlines get a lot of hate, but that was genuinely great service.
Nothing says 'we value your call' like forty minutes of hold music.
My advisor read the whole draft over the weekend and sent line-by-line comments. I don't know how she does it.
Fantastic. The build passes on my machine and nowhere else. Love that for me.
The conference wifi actually worked this year. Small miracles.
Yeah, because what this meeting really needed was another meeting to plan it.
